The Journey

How We Redefined Dairy

A vertical timeline outlining our mission to restore trust, transparency, and fairness in the milk industry.

2024 — THE INSPIRATION

Why ApnaDoodh Was Created

Frustrated by the lack of quality in processed corporate milk and the unfair, delayed compensation given to hardworking rural farmers, our founders asked: why can't we bypass the middle steps and buy direct?

2024 — THE PROBLEM

The Packaged processed Dairy Crisis

Traditional packaged milk undergoes harsh heat processing, strips vital nutrients, sits in cold storage hubs for days, and is often blended with stabilizers. Transparency is completely lost in massive corporate supply chains.

2025 — THE SOLUTION

Bypassing the Middlemen

We established a strict 4°C cold-chain pipeline connecting local farms directly to customers. Eliminating complex distributor channels allows us to deliver pure, unadulterated milk to doorsteps within 12 hours of milking.

2025 — EMPOWERING FARMERS

Sustainable Direct-Trade Fair Pricing

By removing distributors, we enabled farmers to set their own pricing models. ApnaDoodh issues daily digital payouts, supporting agricultural sustainability and allowing direct reinvestment into quality cow care.

2026 — DIGITAL MARKETPLACE

A Trusted Community Platform

Today, ApnaDoodh connects hundreds of organic dairy farms to thousands of active families. Daily independent lab tests and purity logs are published directly online, establishing an open era of dairy transparency.

Our Pillars

Our Core Mission

Building a dairy marketplace that protects the interests of primary food creators and ensures wholesome nutrition for families.

Empower Farmers

Providing local dairy farmers direct access to high-margin markets, absolute pricing freedom, daily payouts, and cold storage support to grow sustainable businesses.

Deliver Fresh Dairy

Ensuring pure, unadulterated raw milk and freshly set dairy items reach doorsteps under 12 hours of milking, locked at optimal refrigeration temperatures.

Build Trust

Pioneering traceability by publishing chemical purity and SNF fat quality logs online every single morning, giving consumers ultimate safety insurance.

Support Local Communities

Keeping agricultural wealth within local farming families, supporting organic dairy practices, and funding community-driven cow husbandry models.

The Horizon

Our Vision

“To become India's most trusted farm-to-home dairy marketplace.”

Why We Exist

A Better Way to Buy Dairy

ApnaDoodh replaces the broken traditional dairy model with a direct-trade ecosystem built on purity, technology, and mutual benefit.

Direct Farmer Connections

Connect with the exact family farm producing your milk. No centralized aggregation, no blending of different farmers' outputs.

Transparent Pricing

We display exactly how much of your purchase goes straight to the farmer. Removing middlemen ensures farmers earn what they deserve.

Fresh Every Morning

Our delivery fleet collects fresh milk, chills it to 4°C, and delivers it to your doorstep before 7:00 AM in under 12 hours.

Verified Dairy Farmers

Every vendor farm undergoes frequent checks for organic pasture feed, veterinary hygiene, and zero hormones.

Secure Marketplace

Integrated digital ledgers automate daily payouts directly to farmers, securing subscriptions and refunds instantly.

Sustainable Local Commerce

We package in sterilized medical-grade glass bottles, collecting empty bottles daily to wash and reuse, avoiding plastic landfills.

The Difference We Make

Our Growing Impact

Through simple technology and fair trade, we are creating a positive, transparent ripple effect across rural farms and urban homes.

Farmer Spotlight

Meet Our Food Creators

ApnaDoodh does not aggregate or anonymize milk. We shine a light on the dedicated families who raise the herds.

4.2 Rating
Vedic Farms
Featured Partner

Ramesh Kumar

3rd Generation Farmer • 15+ Years Care

For three generations, Ramesh's family raised purebred Gir cows, yielding A2 milk of exceptional nutrition. However, selling to traditional industrial agents meant his milk was pooled with low-quality batches, and he faced low, delayed payments.

Partnering with ApnaDoodh in 2025 changed everything. Today, Ramesh sets his own rates, packs under his own farm label (Vedic Farms), and receives digital daily payouts. He has reinvested this surplus into premium organic alfalfa feed, automatic chilling plants, and cattle welfare.

45+ Herds

Happy Gir Cows

250+ Litres

Daily Capacity

12 Hours

Milking to Door

Our Foundation

Core Values

The values that guide every line of code we write and every bottle of milk we deliver.

Transparency

Open access to chemical logs and farmer pricing breakdowns.

Quality

No additives, no preservatives, and dual daily safety checks.

Innovation

Integrated digital ledgers and localized smart cold routes.

Trust

Bridging urban families directly with verified local farmers.

Community

Retaining dairy wealth inside rural village communities.

Sustainability

Circular medical-grade glass bottle sanitizing cycles.

Customer First

7:00 AM doorstep drop-offs and seamless subscription models.

Farmer Empowerment

Absolute seller price setting and direct daily cash payouts.

The Founder

Meet Our Founder

Leading the mission to build fair-trade systems in Indian agriculture and connect verified local dairy farmers directly with Indian families.

Yash

Founder

Pioneered ApnaDoodh to build fair-trade systems in Indian agriculture and ensure families get unadulterated milk.

Future of Dairy
